title: ehretia aspera var. obtusifolia
intro: Ehretia aspera var. obtusifolia is a plant species within the Ehretia genus, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ehretia aspera var. obtusifolia include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Ehretia aspera var. obtusifolia is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are made from the plant's leaves, roots, or bark.
